findings.title: Plain-object payload contract was not enforced for exotic objects
findings.disposition: normalizePayload and assertNormalizedControlPlaneServiceRequest now require Object.prototype or null prototypes, and service.test.js rejects Date and Map payloads.

findings.title: Forbidden-claim rejection only caught boolean true values
findings.disposition: normalizeControlPlaneServiceRequest now rejects any provided forbidden claim value other than false/null/undefined, and tests cover string and numeric truthy claims.

findings.title: Payload is shallow-frozen and nested objects remain mutable
findings.disposition: The policy intentionally declares payload_normalization as missing_to_frozen_empty_object_or_shallow_copy_plain_object; deep freeze is deferred outside this S02 normalization slice.

findings.title: Record S02 closeout evidence
findings.disposition: packet.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are recorded for S02.

findings.title: Run local validation after evidence materialization
findings.disposition: Final validation reruns npm run rp00:control-plane:validate, focused service tests, and the full local test suite after evidence materialization.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S02 request-normalization slice with no P0/P1 findings. The review confirmed required exports, deterministic normalization, S03 tenant-boundary deferral, fail-closed unsafe-claim handling, no runtime routing, no service execution, no real data, no product-state writes, no registry/state mutation, and no RP00/RP00.P02 completion claim. P2/P3 findings were fixed or adjudicated before closeout.
